mapper.select: SELECT p.* FROM t_permission p INNER JOIN t_role_permission rp ON p.permission_id = rp.permission_id WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId} AND p.deleted = 0 AND rp.deleted = 0
SELECT role_id FROM t_role_permission WHERE permission_id = #{permissionId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_role_permission (role_id, permission_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{roleId}, #{permissionId}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE updated_at = NOW()
mapper.delete: UPDATE t_role_permission SET deleted = 1, deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_role_permission SET deleted = 1, deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE permission_id = #{permissionId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_role_permission (role_id, permission_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{roleId}, #{permissionId}, NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE updated_at = NOW()
